positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for german_romance_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    german != basque).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    french != basque).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    french != spanish).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    spanish != german).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    french != german).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    romance_language(spanish)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    romance_language(french)).

cnf(u26,negated_conjecture,
    ~romance_language(german)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~related(basque,X0) | basque = X0).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    related(german,spanish)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    spanish != basque).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define indo_european(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define language_family(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_family(X0,X1) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
